Tab-f64c39d5f9444a83b85f255cce81ee14.ReplikantoProperties: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?> <ReplikantoProperties xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"> <AlwaysOnTop>false</AlwaysOnTop> <AreTabsVisible>false</AreTabsVisible> <NetworkAdapterName>VMware Network Adapter VMnet1</NetworkAdapterName> <Font> <Bold>false</Bold> <FamilySerialize>Arial</FamilySerialize> <Italic>false</Italic> <Size>12</Size> </Font> <OrderTypeWhenInvert>StopMarket</OrderTypeWhenInvert> <OffSet>1</OffSet> <StealthMode>false</StealthMode> <TabName>@INSTRUMENT_FULL</TabName> <OnlyActiveWokspace>true</OnlyActiveWokspace> <BlockCopy>false</BlockCopy> <ScalperTicketIntegration>true</ScalperTicketIntegration> <EmailSubject>Replikanto Follower Disarm Alert</EmailSubject> <DisarmFollowers>true</DisarmFollowers> <CancelEntry>false</CancelEntry> <CancelEntrySeconds>5</CancelEntrySeconds> <FlattenPositionOnOutOfSync>false</FlattenPositionOnOutOfSync> <FlattenPositionOnOutOfSyncSeconds>10</FlattenPositionOnOutOfSyncSeconds> <FlattenPositionOnOppositeDirection>false</FlattenPositionOnOppositeDirection> <FlattenPositionOnOppositeDirectionSeconds>5</FlattenPositionOnOppositeDirectionSeconds> <FlattenPositionOnRejectError>false</FlattenPositionOnRejectError> <FlattenPositionOnSubmitError>false</FlattenPositionOnSubmitError> <FlattenPositionOnChangeError>false</FlattenPositionOnChangeError> <FlattenPositionOnCancelError>false</FlattenPositionOnCancelError> <FlattenPositionOnOtherError>false</FlattenPositionOnOtherError> <FlattenPositionSecondsOnError>3</FlattenPositionSecondsOnError> <CreditAlert>10</CreditAlert> <NetworkPort>4547</NetworkPort> <LocalNetworkTimeout>1200</LocalNetworkTimeout> <IntrumentPropagation>false</IntrumentPropagation> <ConnectionColumn>false</ConnectionColumn> <SideColumn>true</SideColumn> <QuantityColumn>true</QuantityColumn> <AveragePriceColumn>true</AveragePriceColumn> <PnLColumn>true</PnLColumn> <DescriptionNodeColumn>true</DescriptionNodeColumn> <DescriptionInternetNodeColumn>true</DescriptionInternetNodeColumn> <CashValueColumn>false</CashValueColumn> </ReplikantoProperties>
Tab-f64c39d5f9444a83b85f255cce81ee14.FollowersFieldLayout: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <xamDataPresenter version="25.1.20251.22" formatVersion="2.1"> <fieldLayouts> <fieldLayout key="SlaveAccount" orientation="Vertical" fieldList="Status;FollowerAccountStatus, AccountDisplay, Connection, CashValue;Double, NetLiquidation;Double, PctField;Double, FactorAvailableEquity;Double, FactorNetLiq;Double, Ratio;Double, PreAllocation;UInt16, UseATM;Boolean, MarketOnly;Boolean, CrossOrderTarget;String;unbound, Side, Quantity, AveragePrice;Double, PnLValue, Flatten;String;unbound">
